meta.setting: Road junction supply posts, freight counters, pack yards, and water barrels around French Gulch
meta.rdr_clone_target: RDR-clone western with supply pressure, credit, trade, road news, and hard choices

research_grounding.title: NPS Whiskeytown History and Culture
research_grounding.use: Gold rush communities, road movement, mining, logging, ranching, and immigrant settlement pressure.

research_grounding.title: California State Parks Shasta State Historic Park
research_grounding.use: Northern California mining commerce, merchandise, and town supply texture.

generation_prompt.task: Generate the Sutler Posts region page for the 1899 Jefferson State western packet. This JSON contains shape and guidance only.
page_shape: H3 local marker line in the register of Counter, Crates, and Road Credit
square image reference immediately after the marker line
opening blockquote built as three short generated lines: object, weather or track, plain meaning
two compact paragraphs establishing the post as supply point, social pressure, road resource, and scene engine
closing blockquote that gives a generated supply-post sign and practical table meaning
generation_guidance: Generate trading and supply posts as road-edge commerce: goods, credit, news, repair, water, false shortages, and exploitation.
Make the page useful for restocking, barter scenes, overheard news, dangerous favors, and leverage around who owes what.
Use flour sacks, tack, coffee, cartridges, barrel water, crate slats, mule loads, and road dust as physical language.
A sutler post should feel like a store that charges extra because it knows how far the next one is.
generation_prompt.hand_cut_note: Need is the first customer through every door.
generation_prompt.table_spark: A sutler-post scene should ask what supply is missing, who can pay, who must bargain, and what road news comes with the sale.
must_preserve: Use 1899 western supply and trade language only.
The generated page must include image path regions/images/sutler-posts.png.
The prompt must not contain final prose, final blockquotes, or finished field marks.
avoid: do not mention any prior packet, inherited taxonomy, or non-western source language
do not make trade quaint or consequence-free
do not use modern registers, barcodes, plastic packaging, vehicles, or clean theme-park staging
self_check: The future markdown follows the exact heading sequence.
The future page is about supply, credit, road news, repair, and table action.
The prompt contains no finished page prose.
All language belongs to grounded 1899 Jefferson State western play.
